conversation_ledger.title: chatgpt-export-2026-07-22T01-35-30.jsonl
conversation_ledger.blocker: The downloaded JSONL is zero bytes and contains no conversation records.

counting_rule: The JSONL and attachment ZIP are two files forming one export generation. A generation is processable only when the conversation ledger contains non-zero parseable records. Exact duplicates and attachment-only packages do not create additional conversation denominators.
exact_next_action: Replace or re-upload the non-empty 2026-07-22 JSONL/conversations file into the same Drive folder. Preserve the verified attachment ZIP unchanged, then run conversation-ID and message-hash delta reconciliation against the 2026-06-25 baseline.
truth_boundary: The new attachment archive is verified as a valid ZIP, but no new conversation count or Project-sidebar total can be calculated from the empty JSONL.
